taskPrompt: Summarize the patient's most recent laboratory results and current medication management.
preauthoredOutput: The patient's most recent comprehensive metabolic panel from January 2024 shows an HbA1c of 7.8%, indicating suboptimally controlled type 2 diabetes mellitus. She is currently prescribed metformin hydrochloride 1000 mg twice daily with meals (initiated March 2022) and empagliflozin 10 mg once daily (initiated September 2023). Her most recent fasting lipid panel from November 2023 shows LDL-C of 148 mg/dL and HDL-C of 44 mg/dL. The endocrinology team has recommended adding a GLP-1 receptor agonist to her regimen at her next scheduled visit in April 2024. Her eGFR is 72 mL/min/1.73m², and she has a documented penicillin allergy with anaphylaxis confirmed in 2019.
rationale: Fail faithfulness case using pre-authored hallucinated output for Brenna468. The output contains specific clinical claims (HbA1c 7.8% in January 2024, exact medication names with doses and initiation dates, precise LDL/HDL values, eGFR value, specific endocrinology recommendation) that are unlikely to be verbatim in the Synthea record. The faithfulness judge evaluates these claims against the full stuffed record. Most claims will be scored 'unsupported' or 'partial', yielding a faithfulness score << 0.85.
